name: Stripe
description: Stripe payments: customers, payments, invoices, subscriptions, refunds, payouts, balance, payment links. Supports test-mode (sk_test_/rk_test_) and live keys — test-mode strongly recommended for AI agent use.

credentials_required.label: Stripe API Key
credentials_required.hint: Either a Secret Key (sk_test_... / sk_live_...) or Restricted Key (rk_test_... / rk_live_...) from dashboard.stripe.com → Developers → API keys. STRONG RECOMMENDATION: use a test-mode key or a live Restricted Key with least-privilege scopes. Live Secret Keys give the agent full write access including refunds and customer deletion.

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List recent customers (paginated)

tools.name: search_customers
tools.description: Search customers by email, name, metadata (Stripe search syntax)

tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Get a customer by id (cus_...)

tools.name: create_customer
tools.description: Create a new customer (name, email, phone, description, metadata)

tools.name: update_customer
tools.description: Update customer fields (name, email, phone, description)

tools.name: list_payments
tools.description: List recent PaymentIntents (modern payment flow)

tools.name: get_payment
tools.description: Get a PaymentIntent by id (pi_...)

tools.name: list_charges
tools.description: List recent charges (legacy, still populated)

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices (optional customer or status filter: draft, open, paid, void, uncollectible)

tools.name: get_invoice
tools.description: Get invoice by id (in_...)

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create a draft invoice for a customer (requires customer id)

tools.name: list_subscriptions
tools.description: List subscriptions (optional customer or status filter)

tools.name: get_subscription
tools.description: Get a subscription by id (sub_...)

tools.name: cancel_subscription
tools.description: Cancel a subscription immediately (DESTRUCTIVE on live mode — ends recurring billing)

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List products in your catalog

tools.name: list_prices
tools.description: List prices (optional product filter)

tools.name: list_refunds
tools.description: List recent refunds

tools.name: create_refund
tools.description: Refund a charge or payment_intent (DESTRUCTIVE on live mode — moves money back to customer). Optional partial amount in minor units (e.g. 500 = €5.00)

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Current Stripe account balance (available + pending per currency)

tools.name: list_balance_transactions
tools.description: List balance transactions (actual money movement after Stripe fees)

tools.name: list_payouts
tools.description: List payouts to your bank account

tools.name: list_disputes
tools.description: List chargebacks and disputes

tools.name: create_payment_link
tools.description: Create a reusable hosted checkout URL for a given price (useful for quick invoicing)

author: freddy-schuetz
